allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd /d C:\\Proyectos Digito\\aelu\\codigo\\AELU && php artisan tinker --execute=""$student = App\\Models\\Student::where\(''first_names'', ''like'', ''%%SUSANA%%''\)->where\(''last_names'', ''like'', ''%%UCHIMA%%''\)->first\(\); echo $student ? $student->full_name . '' ID: '' . $student->id : ''No encontrado'';""")

Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u root -proot aelutest -e "
SELECT
    CONCAT\(s.last_names, ' ', s.first_names\) AS alumno,
    w.name AS taller,
    w.day_of_week,
    w.start_time,
    w.modality,
    se.id AS enrollment_id,
    eb.id AS batch_id,
    eb.payment_status
FROM student_enrollments se
JOIN instructor_workshops iw ON se.instructor_workshop_id = iw.id
JOIN workshops w ON iw.workshop_id = w.id
JOIN enrollment_batches eb ON se.enrollment_batch_id = eb.id
JOIN students s ON eb.student_id = s.id
WHERE w.monthly_period_id = 15
  AND w.id IN \(465,466,467,468,469,470,471,472\)
  AND eb.payment_status IN \('pending','to_pay','completed'\)
ORDER BY w.name, w.day_of_week, CONCAT\(s.last_names,' ',s.first_names\);
" 2>/dev/null)
